summary.lv: Full-Stack Arhitekts Arvato Systems Latvia, nodrošinot tehnisko vadību izstrādes komandām un pārraugot tīmekļa lietotņu arhitektūru ar TYPO3 un Symfony.
summary.en: Full-Stack Architect at Arvato Systems Latvia, providing technical leadership to development teams and overseeing web application architecture using TYPO3 and Symfony frameworks.
